rag_rules: Place output range guarantees in component type scopes using visible feature names and concrete bounds
Use valid AGREE syntax for assumptions and guarantees within annex agree blocks
generic_rules: Component type contracts should reference visible ports and features only
AGREE annexes must use valid scalar types (int, real, bool) for constants and equations
Guarantees should relate visible outputs to visible inputs without implementation-specific paths
Assignments in implementation scopes should follow subcomponent and connection bindings
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts are enclosed in `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks
Use `assume "label": expression;` and `guarantee "label": expression;` for contracts
Equations and constants use `eq name : type = expression;` and `const name : type = value;`
anti_patterns: Do not reference subcomponent ports in component type annexes
Do not encode AADL timing properties as AGREE expressions without explicit typed ports
irrelevant_topics: AADL property associations and timing tokens
